nodes.name: Crash Site
nodes.description: An overgrown courtyard surrounded by high concrete walls. Water drips from hanging moss.

interactions.text: The escape pod wreckage. Zeke is sitting on a metal crate nearby.

nodes.name: Razor-Vine Path
nodes.description: A narrow trail choked with glowing, thorny vines. The air is thick with purple spores.

nodes.name: Tideglass Beach
nodes.description: A hidden cove where the jungle meets a glowing, resonant lake. Shimmering tide pools hum softly.

interactions.text: The glowing water is calm here, perfect for fishing.

nodes.name: Canopy Ridge
nodes.description: A wind-carved stone shelf high above the jungle. The Planetary Shield curves across the sky above.

nodes.name: Temple Gate
nodes.description: A massive stone door, perfectly smooth and engraved with glowing cymatic patterns.

interactions.text: A smooth stone resonator lock. It has a slot shaped like the Chime.

nodes.name: Hall of Echoes
nodes.description: A grand corridor of clean, ancient geometry. Shifting light-murals on the walls depict the history of the Architects.

interactions.text: Shifting murals made of light. They shimmer when you approach.

nodes.name: Stasis Chamber
nodes.description: A circular room dominated by a single, humming pod. Shimmering rings of energy hover around it.

interactions.text: A sealed pod containing a sleeping figure. Shimmering stasis rings hover out of alignment.

nodes.name: Source Gate
nodes.description: A giant barrier of humming energy blocking access to the hangar.

interactions.text: A massive acoustic lock. It vibrates with three discordant frequencies.

nodes.name: Hangar Bay
nodes.description: A vast underground cavern open to the sky. The Astra sits silent on the launch pad.

interactions.text: The Astra. Her hull is scorched and her bridge systems are dark.

nodes.name: The Sky
nodes.description: Flying high above the cloud layer, approaching the violet glow of the Planetary Shield.
